| `csrr` | `rd, csr` | `rd ← csr` | *CSR read* (pseudoinstrucció) | I |
| `csrw` | `csr, rs1` | `csr ← rs1` | *CSR write* (pseudoinstrucció) | I |
| `csrrw` | `rd, csr, rs1` | `rd ← csr; csr ← rs1` | *CSR read/write* | I |
| `csrrs` | `rd, csr, rs1` | `rd ← csr; csr ← csr OR rs1` | *CSR read and set bits* | I |
| `csrrc` | `rd, csr, rs1` | `rd ← csr; csr ← csr AND NOT rs1` | *CSR read and clear bits* | I |
